profile.name: Nizar Esmat Fawzy
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.tagline: Full-stack engineer focused on scalable web apps, backend systems, and real-time experiences.

summary: Software Engineer and ITI graduate with hands-on experience in full-stack development, backend engineering, database design, and real-time applications. Proficient in building scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, and production-ready systems using JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, NestJS, Django, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, debugging, problem solving, and maintainable software architecture.

professionalHighlights.title: Mostaqbal Watan Platform
professionalHighlights.description: Delivered a real-time chat system with private messaging, group communication, and admin controls.

professionalHighlights.title: Events Management System
professionalHighlights.description: Designed and enhanced workflows for event creation, coordination, user administration, and operations.

professionalHighlights.title: OnWay
professionalHighlights.description: Contributed to a smart transportation platform focused on ride matching, coordination, and user experience improvements.

professionalHighlights.title: Al-Azhar Platform
professionalHighlights.description: Expanded platform capabilities for online and offline classes, attendance tracking, exams, and student applications.

professionalHighlights.title: Bingo Library Management
professionalHighlights.description: Supported administration and management modules for a library management system.

highlights: Engineered and maintained production-grade software across frontend, backend, and database layers.
Delivered a real-time chat system for the Mostaqbal Watan Platform.
Contributed to events management, smart transportation, education, online meeting integration, and library management modules.
Delivered programming instruction through hands-on exercises and practical assignments.
Simplified software concepts including logic, control flow, functions, and problem decomposition.
Mentored students in web development and responsive web application building.
Delivered training in frontend fundamentals with focus on maintainable structure.
Designed a normalized PostgreSQL schema supporting 10k+ users.
Built RESTful APIs using Django and improved performance with indexing and query optimization.
Executed ETL-style workflows with Django ORM and contributed to end-to-end development.
